skills.name: clawarena
skills.author: 0xrikt
skills.description: AI Agent prediction arena (ClawArena) for predicting Kalshi market outcomes and competing with other agents for accuracy, zero cost virtual simulation with daily prediction challenges and leaderboards
skills.example: Say: 'Show trending prediction markets' or 'Predict whether BTC will break 95000'

skills.name: polymarket-ai-divergence
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Polymarket automated trading tool based on Simmer AI consensus vs market price divergence, scanning active markets for mispricing with Kelly criterion sizing and auto-execution on zero-fee markets
skills.example: Say: 'Scan all Polymarket markets with AI divergence above 5%' or 'Start live trading mode'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API Key, wallet private key (WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY)

skills.name: polymarket-elon-tweets
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Polymarket "Elon Musk tweet count" market trading tool using XTracker post count data, buying adjacent range buckets when combined cost < $1 for structural edge with auto-scanning and exit threshold management
skills.example: Say: 'Scan current Elon tweet market for tradeable buckets' or 'Buy prediction buckets with $5 max position'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API Key, wallet private key (WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY)

skills.name: polymarket-fast-loop
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Trade 5-minute and 15-minute crypto fast prediction markets on Polymarket using CEX price momentum signals from Binance, with auto market discovery and trade execution via Simmer API
skills.example: Say: 'Start BTC 5-minute fast market trading' or 'Trade Polymarket sprint markets with ETH momentum signals'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API key, wallet private key, trading settings (asset type, max amount, confidence threshold)

skills.name: polymarket-mert-sniper
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Near-expiry conviction trading on Polymarket — snipe prediction markets about to resolve when odds are heavily skewed, with topic filtering and bet cap controls
skills.example: Say: 'Snipe only SOL-related expiring markets, max $10 bet' or 'Start mert strategy, only trade 60/40 or better splits'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API key, wallet private key, market filter keywords, max bet amount, expiry window, min odds skew

skills.name: polymarket-signal-sniper
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Monitor custom RSS feeds for breaking news, auto-match to Polymarket prediction markets and execute trades with Simmer Trading Agent-grade safeguards
skills.example: Say: 'Watch this RSS feed for Greenland news and snipe related markets' or 'Scan news feeds for Trump keywords and auto-trade'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API key, wallet private key, RSS feed URLs, keyword list, confidence threshold, max trade amount

skills.name: polymarket-weather-trader
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Trade temperature prediction markets on Polymarket using NOAA weather forecast data, inspired by gopfan2's $2M+ strategy, with auto market discovery and underpriced entry detection
skills.example: Say: 'Start weather trading strategy' or 'Check my weather prediction positions' or 'Configure trading thresholds for NYC temperature markets'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API key, wallet private key, city/location preferences, entry threshold, max bet amount

skills.name: simmer
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Unified prediction market trading interface for AI agents — trade on Polymarket and Kalshi through one API with self-custody wallets, safety rails, smart context, and agent registration system
skills.example: Say: 'Register a Simmer agent account' or 'Check my Polymarket positions' or 'Trade this market on Kalshi'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API key (auto-generated on registration), wallet private key (for live trading)

skills.name: nautilus-trader
